code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BookingStatusBadge=_ref=>{let{status}=_ref;const getStatusClass=()=>{switch(status){case'PENDING':return'status-pending';case'APPROVED':return'status-approved';case'REJECTED':return'status-rejected';case'CANCELLED':return'status-cancelled';default:return'';}};const getStatusText=()=>{switch(status){case'PENDING':return'Pending';case'APPROVED':return'Approved';case'REJECTED':return'Rejected';case'CANCELLED':return'Cancelled';default:return status;}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`booking-status ${getStatusClass()}`,children:getStatusText()});};export default BookingStatusBadge;
